description: For the agent sessions view please move the chat selection to light the top right and it should not be like an entire column or part of the UI it should just be like a button that says the currently chosen chat and then you can click it and it would expand to show all the chats that are selectable and then the bottom of it would be start new chat and then once you click one of them it collapses again
title: Move chat selector to top right as dropdown button

descriptionHistory.description: For the agent sessions view please move the chat selection to light the top right and it should not be like an entire column or part of the UI it should just be like a button that says the currently chosen chat and then you can click it and it would expand to show all the chats that are selectable and then the bottom of it would be start new chat and then once you click one of them it collapses again
